description_long: This is a stylized adult female pedestrian with an athletic build, depicted in a standing pose with arms extended horizontally. She wears a sleeveless crop top and short shorts, exposing her midriff and legs, and has fingerless gloves and arm guards on both arms, with the right arm guard featuring a more prominent design. Her footwear consists of high-top boots with thick soles, suitable for urban environments. The character's long, straight hair is tied back in a low ponytail, cascading down her back. The overall appearance suggests a modern, active individual, possibly inspired by video game or anime aesthetics, with a focus on mobility and urban style.
description: A stylized athletic adult woman in a crop top, shorts, arm guards, and high-top boots, with long hair tied in a ponytail. Her outfit and accessories suggest an active, urban look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of her face, chest, and the length of her ponytail, with arm guards and boots visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full length of her ponytail, back, and the symmetrical design of her arm guards and boots.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other profile, arm guard details, and the curve of her back and legs.
description_view_3: Front view showing her facial features, crop top, shorts, and the design of her gloves and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic crop top, short shorts, fingerless gloves, arm guards, high-top boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
